name: item-icon
visual_summary: The item-icon component is a reusable UI element that displays an icon associated with an item, commonly used in applications that organize items into categories, such as e-commerce websites, app dashboards, or navigation menus.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready badge component with the following characteristics:

Name: item-icon
Description: The item-icon component is a reusable UI element that displays an icon associated with an item, commonly used in applications that organize items into categories, such as e-commerce websites, app dashboards, or navigation menus.
Style: e.g. material, flat
Interactions: e.g. clickable, hover
Tags: list-item, icon, item-metadata

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
